signals.title: @sama: (also the internet; there should be a protocol that is equally usable by people and agents
signals.content: (also the internet; there should be a protocol that is equally usable by people and agents)' author: id: '1605' name: Sam Altman screenName: sama profileImageUrl: https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/2046764873200394240/r7BxVezs_normal.jpg verified: true metrics: likes: 12389 retweets: 773 replies: 1813 quotes: 558 views: 1564003 bookmarks: 1956 createdAt: Sun Apr 26 15:46:41 +0000 2026 createdAtLocal: 2026-04-26 15:46 createdAtISO: '2026-04-26T15:46:41+00:00' media: [] urls: [] isRetweet: false retweetedBy: null lang: en score: null id: '1963366714684707120' text: i never took the dead internet theory that seriously but it seems like there are really a lot of LLM-run twitter accounts now author: id: '1605' name: Sam Altman screenName: sama profileImageUrl: https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/2046764873200394240/r7BxVezs_normal.jpg verified: true metrics: likes: 33540 retweets: 1420 replies: 3328 quotes: 1668 views: 5784938 bookmarks: 2602 createdAt: Wed Sep 03 22:21:17 +0000 2025 createdAtLocal: 2025-09-03 22:21 createdAtISO: '2025-09-03T22:21:17+00:00' media: [] urls: [] isRetweet: false retweetedBy: null lang: en score: null id: '1965110064215458055' text: 'i have had the strangest experience reading this: i assume its all fake/bots, even though in this case i know codex growth is really strong and the trend here is real.
signals.score_reason: Twitter/X discussion signal; agentic AI relevance; large language model relevance. Final score: 52.
signals.brief_en: Sam Altman (@sama) notes the increasing presence of LLM-run Twitter accounts, sparking concerns about the authenticity of online interactions. He mentions the 'Dead Internet Theory' and expresses uncertainty about what is real and what is generated by bots.
signals.brief_ar: يشير سام ألتمان (@sama) إلى زيادة وجود حسابات تويتر التي تعمل بواسطة نموذج لغة كبير (LLM)، مما يثير مخاوف بشأن أصالة التفاعلات عبر الإنترنت. ويذكر نظرية "الإنترنت الميت" ويعبر عن عدم اليقين حول ما هو حقيقي وما يتم توليده بواسطة البوتات.

signals.title: @sama: AI safety and wide distribution of benefits are the core of our mission. Two of our most i
signals.content: AI safety and wide distribution of benefits are the core of our mission. Two of our most important safety principles are prohibitions on domestic mass surveillance and human responsibility for the use of force, including for autonomous weapon systems.  The DoW agrees with these principles, reflects them in law and policy, and we put them into our agreement.
signals.score_reason: Twitter/X discussion signal; surveillance relevance. Final score: 48.
signals.brief_en: AI safety and wide distribution of benefits are core to our mission, emphasizing prohibitions on domestic mass surveillance and human responsibility for autonomous weapon systems.
signals.brief_ar: سلامة الذكاء الاصطناعي والتوزيع الواسع للفوائد هي أساسية لرسالتنا، تشدد على منع المراقبة الجماعية المحلية ومسؤولية الإنسان عن أنظمة الأسلحة الآلية.

signals.title: @sama: ok: true schema_version: '1' data: id: '2067775843842081165' text: Llevo días desarrolland
signals.content: ok: true schema_version: '1' data: id: '2067775843842081165' text: Llevo días desarrollando un proyecto con IA, ayer comencé a tantear con  Gemma 4 de Google y me gusta. Así se ve un entor con sus app agents 😁 https://t.co/q3luwqprIM author: id: '281304156' name: ᗷしᗩᔑᔑしᝪᑭᏃ screenName: Bleasepic profileImageUrl: https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1755033820871507968/JL4otlPR_normal.jpg verified: false metrics: likes: 0 retweets: 0 replies: 0 quotes: 0 views: 0 bookmarks: 0 createdAt: Fri Jun 19 01:05:53 +0000 2026 createdAtLocal: 2026-06-19 01:05 createdAtISO: '2026-06-19T01:05:53+00:00' media: type: photo url: https://pbs.twimg.com/media/HLI3K6PX0AAK-Yj.jpg width: 1319 height: 681 urls: [] isRetweet: false retweetedBy: null lang: es score: null id: '1905622840306704787' text: the gpt-4o update is GOOD author: id: '1605' name: Sam Altman screenName: sama profileImageUrl: https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/2046764873200394240/r7BxVezs_normal.jpg verified: true metrics: likes: 19342 retweets: 612 replies: 1561 quotes: 235 views: 2885949 bookmarks: 651 createdAt: Fri Mar 28 14:07:44 +0000 2025 createdAtLocal: 2025-03-28 14:07 createdAtISO: '2025-03-28T14:07:44+00:00' media: [] urls: [] isRetweet: false retweetedBy: null lang: en score: null id: '1984025727763935585' text: GPT-6 will be renamed GPT-6-7, you're welcome author: id: '1605' name: Sam Altman screenName: sama profileImageUrl: https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/2046764873200394240/r7BxVezs_normal.jpg verified: true metrics: likes: 42806 retweets: 2111 replies: 4099 quotes: 1662 views: 13996382 bookmarks: 2150 createdAt: Thu Oct 30 22:32:49 +0000 2025 createdAtLocal: 2025-10-30 22:32 createdAtISO: '2025-10-30T22:32:49+00:00' media: [] urls: [] isRetweet: false retweetedBy: null lang: en score: null id: '2027578652477821175' text: 'Tonight, we reached an agreement with the Department of War to deploy our models in their classified network.
signals.score_reason: Twitter/X discussion signal; agentic AI relevance; model capability relevance. Final score: 42.
signals.brief_en: Sam Altman (@sama) comments on GPT updates, with a recent post stating the GPT-4o update is good. Another user is experimenting with Gemma 4 from Google, indicating potential advancements in AI technology.
signals.brief_ar: سام ألتمان (@sama) يعلق على تحديثات GPT، حيث نشر مؤخرًا أن تحديث GPT-4o جيد. يستخدم مستخدم آخر Gemma 4 من جوجل، مما يشير إلى تقدم محتمل في تكنولوجيا الذكاء الاصطناعي.

signals.title: @sama: We are asking the DoW to offer these same terms to all AI companies, which in our opinion
signals.content: We are asking the DoW to offer these same terms to all AI companies, which in our opinion we think everyone should be willing to accept. We have expressed our strong desire to see things de-escalate away from legal and governmental actions and towards reasonable agreements.
signals.brief_en: We urge the DoW to extend these terms to all AI companies, which we believe should be acceptable to all. We express our strong desire for de-escalation from legal and governmental actions towards reasonable agreements.
signals.brief_ar: نحن نحث وزارة الدفاع على تقديم هذه الشروط لجميع شركات الذكاء الاصطناعي، التي نعتقد أنها يجب أن تكون مقبولة للجميع. نعرب عن رغبتنا القوية في التهدئة بعيداً عن الإجراءات القانونية والحكومية ونحو اتفاقات معقولة.

signals.title: @sama: More importantly, we believe everyone deserves to use AI and are committed to free access,
signals.content: More importantly, we believe everyone deserves to use AI and are committed to free access, because we believe access creates agency. More Texans use ChatGPT for free than total people use Claude in the US, so we have a differently-shaped problem than they do. (If you want to pay for ChatGPT Plus or Pro, we don''t show you ads.)
signals.brief_en: We believe everyone deserves to use AI and are committed to free access, as it creates agency. Notably, more Texans use ChatGPT for free than the total number of Claude users in the US.
signals.brief_ar: نعتقد أن الجميع يستحقون استخدام الذكاء الاصطناعي ونلتزم بالوصول المجاني، لأنه يخلق قوة تفعيل. ومن الملاحظ أن عدد المستخدمين المجانيين لتشات جي بي تي في تكساس أكثر من إجمالي مستخدمي كلود في الولايات المتحدة

signals.title: @sama: Anthropic serves an expensive product to rich people. We are glad they do that and we are
signals.content: Anthropic serves an expensive product to rich people. We are glad they do that and we are doing that too, but we also feel strongly that we need to bring AI to billions of people who can’t pay for subscriptions.
signals.brief_en: Anthropic offers high-end AI products to affluent clients. We acknowledge their efforts and are working towards similar goals. However, we also prioritize making AI accessible to billions of people who cannot afford subscription-based services.
signals.brief_ar: يقدم أنثروبك منتجات ذكاء اصطناعي فاخرة للعملاء الأغنياء. نحن نقر بالجهد المبذول ونعمل نحو أهداف مماثلة. ومع ذلك ، فإننا نعتبر أيضًا جعل الذكاء الاصطناعي متاحًا لمليارات الأشخاص الذين لا يستطيعون تحمل تكاليف الخدمات المبنية على الاشتراك.
